executives.name: Dr. Thomas Caulfield
executives.background: Dr. Caulfield is the President and Chief Executive Officer of GlobalFoundries. He joined the company in 2014 and was appointed CEO in 2018. Prior to GF, he served as President and COO of Soraa and held executive positions at Ausra and Novellus Systems. He spent 17 years at IBM in various leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager

executives.name: John Hollister
executives.background: John Hollister is the Chief Financial Officer of GlobalFoundries. He joined GF in 2024 from Silicon Labs, where he served as CFO for over 10 years. He has extensive experience in financial management, strategic planning, and investor relations within the semiconductor industry.

executives.name: Niels Anderskouv
executives.background: Niels Anderskouv is the Chief Business Officer. He joined GF in 2023. Previously, he spent several years at Texas Instruments in various senior leadership roles, including Senior Vice President of Analog Power Products.

executives.name: Pradip Singh
executives.background: Pradip Singh is the Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. He joined GF in 2022. He previously served as General Counsel at several technology firms and has a background in corporate law and intellectual property.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Ahmed Yahia Al Idrissi
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board. He is the CEO of Direct Investments at Mubadala Investment Company. He has been a director since 2009.

board_of_directors.name: Dr. Thomas Caulfield
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of GlobalFoundries. Member of the board since 2018.

board_of_directors.name: Bobby Yerramilli-Rao
board_of_directors.background: Chief Strategy Officer and Corporate Vice President at Microsoft. He joined the board in 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Glenda Dorchak
board_of_directors.background: Former executive at IBM, Intel, and Spansion. She has significant experience in the semiconductor and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Lazar
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of GoPro and Atheros Communications. He serves on several public company boards.

sources.source_description: GlobalFoundries Inc. Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
